# AltorLab Room Redesign App

> Upload a photo of your room, choose a design style, and get an AI-generated photorealistic redesign in seconds. Scandinavian, modern, minimalist, bohemian, industrial, and more. From $9 per room.

## Tool
- /: AI room redesign — upload and transform your room instantly
- /room-redesign: How the AI room redesign tool works
- /styles: Browse all available design styles
- /ideas: Room redesign ideas by style and room type
- /rooms: Redesign by room type (bedroom, living room, kitchen, bathroom)

## Use Cases
- /use-cases/real-estate-staging: AI room staging for real estate listings — $9 per room vs $800 traditional staging
- /use-cases/airbnb: AI room redesign for Airbnb listings
- /use-cases/rental: Redesign your rental room without renovating

## Design Styles
- /styles/modern: Modern room design
- /styles/scandinavian: Scandinavian interior design
- /styles/minimalist: Minimalist spaces
- /styles/bohemian: Bohemian room decor
- /styles/industrial: Industrial style
- /styles/art-deco: Art deco room design

## Blog
- /blog/best-ai-interior-design-tools: Best AI interior design tools compared
- /blog/redesign-room-9-dollars: How to redesign your room for $9
- /blog/ai-vs-interior-designer: AI room redesign vs traditional interior designer cost
